articles.title: Shades of a Lunar Eclipse
articles.summary: A series of nighttime satellite images revealed how moonlight reaching Earth varied throughout a total lunar eclipse.

articles.title: NASA’s Van Allen Probe A to Re-Enter Atmosphere
articles.summary: NASA’s Van Allen Probe A is expected to re-enter Earth’s atmosphere almost 14 years after launch. From 2012 to 2019, the spacecraft and its twin, Van Allen Probe B, flew through the Van Allen belts...

articles.title: About Subsonic Flight Demonstrator (SFD) Project

articles.title: About Flight Demonstrations and Capabilities (FDC) Project
articles.summary: The FDC project conducts complex integrated small-scale flight research to validate the benefits of new technologies. By modifying aircraft from FDC’s support fleet, the project enables aggressive,...
